^2 = GameID: RMHE08
^3 = NAME: Monster Hunter 3 Tri
!Jokers: {<div Class="note"><h4>note</H4><ul Class="bullet-List"><li><code>xxxx</Code> = Button Value(s). Replace Each <code>x</Code> With The Hex For The Buttons You Want.</Li><li><code>mmmm</Code> = Mask. Replace Each <code>m</Code> With The Computed Mask Value.</Li><li>compute The Mask In Hex: <code>mmmm = Ffff − Xxxx</Code> (subtract Your Button Value From <code>ffff</Code>).</Li><li>the Mask Lets A Button Activator Accept Other Buttons Without Deactivating The Code.</Li></Ul></Div>}
